meta.sourceOfTruth: Official resume. Facts (companies, titles, dates, metrics, technologies, achievements) are preserved exactly; only narrative framing and presentation are formatted.
meta.assumptions: employment_type defaults to 'Full-time'; 'industry' is derived from company context for the timeline. Confirm both.

companies.company: LeewayHertz Technology Pvt. Ltd. (A Hackett Group Company)
companies.role: Technical Program Manager (GenAI Solutions & Platform Product Delivery)
companies.summary: Technical Program Manager driving GenAI solutions and platform product delivery for ZBrain — owning requirements-to-delivery for a multi-agent AI platform spanning agent observability, Flow Builder, RAG pipelines, LLM workflows, AI governance, and LLMOps, while building the PM/QA/BA function from scratch.
business_context: ZBrain is an enterprise multi-agent AI platform delivered to large organizations adopting GenAI in production.
Scope spans the full platform surface: multi-agent orchestration, agent observability, Flow Builder, RAG pipelines, and LLM workflows — under an AI governance and LLMOps model.
key_challenges: Standing up a product-delivery discipline (PM/QA/BA) from scratch inside a fast-moving 60+ member organization.
Translating fast-evolving GenAI capabilities into a predictable requirement-to-sprint pipeline.
Controlling LLM token cost and production quality while shipping at platform pace.

initiatives.name: ZBrain Multi-Agent AI Platform
initiatives.description: Platform product delivery for the multi-agent system — orchestration, RAG pipelines, and LLM workflows.
initiatives.my_role: Program manager owning PRDs, roadmap, and cross-functional delivery.
outcomes: Standardized the requirement-to-delivery flow across the platform
Established PRD-driven delivery for new platform capabilities

initiatives.name: Agent Observability
initiatives.description: Observability for production agents — traces, cost, and quality signals.
initiatives.my_role: Defined requirements and delivery for observability tooling.
outcomes: Improved visibility into production agent behavior and cost

initiatives.name: Flow Builder
initiatives.description: Visual workflow authoring for composing agent workflows.
initiatives.my_role: Product delivery ownership across discovery and execution.
outcomes: Enabled workflow composition within the platform

initiatives.name: AI Governance & LLMOps
initiatives.description: Governance and operational lifecycle for LLM-based workflows.
outcomes: Brought quality and cost controls into the delivery lifecycle

responsibilities: Authored 40+ PRDs and user stories for GenAI platform capabilities
Built the PM / QA / BA function from scratch
Managed delivery across a 60+ member organization
Owned program delivery valued at $2M
Drove requirement-to-sprint planning and cross-functional execution
Established AI governance and LLMOps practices for the platform
achievements: Built the PM / QA / BA function from scratch
Best Executor Spot Award — Mar & Apr 2025 (The Hackett Group)
companies.process_flow:
flowchart LR REQ["Requirements
40+ PRDs"] --> SPRINT["Sprint Planning"] SPRINT --> BUILD["Platform Delivery
ZBrain"] BUILD --> AGENTS["Multi-Agent + RAG
+ Flow Builder"] AGENTS --> OBS["Agent Observability"] OBS --> GOV["AI Governance + LLMOps"] GOV --> REQ

companies.role: Technical Program Manager (Data Services, Data Platform & DataOps)
companies.summary: Technical Program Manager for data services, data platform, and DataOps — leading an enterprise data platform modernization including a Cloudera-to-AWS migration and a Tableau-to-Azure reporting migration, with enterprise reporting and AI operational tooling.
business_context: Enterprise data platform modernization for a Singtel Group company, impacting 20,000+ users.
Migration of legacy data and reporting estates to cloud (AWS, Azure) with a DataOps operating model.
key_challenges: Migrating 300+ TB from Cloudera to AWS without disrupting enterprise operations.
Re-platforming Tableau reporting onto Azure while improving performance and reliability.
Reducing downtime and query latency for a large enterprise user base.

initiatives.name: Cloudera → AWS Migration
initiatives.description: Migration of the enterprise data platform from Cloudera to AWS.
initiatives.my_role: Program manager owning migration delivery and schedule.

initiatives.name: Tableau → Azure Reporting Migration
initiatives.description: Migration of enterprise reporting from Tableau to Azure.

initiatives.name: DataOps & AI Operational Tools
initiatives.description: DataOps practices and AI operational tooling for the platform.
initiatives.my_role: Established DataOps delivery and operational tooling.

responsibilities: Led data services, data platform, and DataOps program delivery
Owned the Cloudera-to-AWS migration end to end
Managed the Tableau-to-Azure enterprise reporting migration
Drove enterprise reporting improvements and AI operational tooling
Coordinated stakeholders across a 20,000+ user base
achievements: Delivered the 300+ TB Cloudera-to-AWS migration 3 months ahead of schedule
Improved query performance ~30% and reduced downtime ~30%
companies.process_flow:
flowchart LR CDH["Cloudera
On-Prem"] --> AWS[("AWS Data Platform")] TAB["Tableau"] --> AZ[("Azure + ADF")] AWS --> OPS["DataOps"] AZ --> RPT["Enterprise Reporting
20,000+ users"] OPS --> SNOW["ServiceNow"]

Recovering hours lost to manual, repetitive work.
